productDisplayName: Nike Women Butterfly Thong Black Purple Flip Flops
description: Let monsoon pave the way for your style with these fun-to-wear-in-the-rains flip flops from nike.Upper Thong strap construction in textile with foam lining Padded straps for snug Fit Fabric toe separator for comfort Embroidered swoosh on the strap Midsole Soft, cushioned foam footbed Footbed with butterfly print on the heel Outsole Grooved TPU outsole for great grip shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
